description: Two independent CTEs joined together in the outer SELECT
name: two_ctes
query_sql:
-- @name GetActiveUsersWithRecentOrders
-- @returns :many
WITH active_users AS (SELECT id, name FROM users WHERE status = 'active'), big_orders AS (SELECT user_id, total FROM orders WHERE total > 100) SELECT a.id, a.name, b.total FROM active_users a JOIN big_orders b ON a.id = b.user_id
schema_sql: CREATE TABLE users (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, email TEXT NOT NULL, status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active', bio TEXT, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now())
CREATE TABLE orders (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, user_id INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id), total INTEGER NOT NULL, notes TEXT, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now())
